structural_claim: Matter undergoes phase transitions at extreme densities where the fundamental degrees of freedom change from composite particles to their constituents

supporting_results.structural_conclusion: Nuclear matter transitions to deconfined quarks and gluons above critical temperature/density

supporting_results.result_name: Neutron Star Equation of State Constraints
supporting_results.structural_conclusion: Ultra-dense matter in neutron star cores may undergo phase transitions to quark matter
Nuclear forces create matter with universal saturation density that constrains neutron star structure
